name: Regroup
brief: Navigate unstable phasing routes and reunite the scattered Player team.
objective: End a Turning Point with all surviving player operatives regrouped in Player B's drop zone.

startingNpos.deployment: Wholly within Player B territory, spread evenly with intervening terrain in control range when viewed from Player A's drop zone.

rules.name: Access Denied
rules.summary: Player operatives cannot set up outside Player A's drop zone before battle or be removed and set up in a different room.

rules.name: Phasing Points
rules.summary: Player operatives cannot Operate Hatch during Dash or Reposition. Moving through a hatchway teleports the operative to a randomly determined open hatchway using its remaining movement.

victory.win: At the end of a Turning Point, every surviving player operative is wholly within Player B's drop zone, outside NPO control range, and within 3 inches of another player operative.
